tracks.meaning: a relationship or association between people, groups, or organizations
a link or interface that enables data or signals to be transmitted between devices or systems
a logical or physical pathway that allows computers or networks to communicate with each other
a service route or scheduled passage between two locations, as in airline or train connections
the linking of bones, joints, or body parts that allows movement or structural support
a sense of relatedness, understanding, or emotional bond with another person
a chemical bond linking atoms or molecules together
a physical link or contact point that allows electric current to flow between conductors or components
a professional contact or acquaintance that can provide opportunities or information
the act of joining or linking two or more things together
a transfer or transition from one place or state to another
a person who supplies illegal drugs or contraband goods
a link between facts or evidence that establishes guilt or responsibility in a legal case
a logical or causal relationship between events separated in sequence
